ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Indicates if the passenger survived (1: Yes, 0: No) */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Passenger class (1st, 2nd or 3rd) */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Gender of the passenger (1: Female, 0: Male) */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the passenger */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid by the passenger */,
  "embarked" INTEGER /* Port of embarkation (0: C, 1: Q, 2: S) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the passenger */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "passport_number" TEXT /* Passport number of the passenger */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the passenger */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the passenger */,
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the voyage */,
  "cabin_number" TEXT /* Cabin number assigned to the passenger */,
  "travel_companions" INTEGER /* Number of travel companions */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Health status of the passenger */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_sex FOREIGN KEY ("sex") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_pclass FOREIGN KEY ("pclass") REFERENCES classifications ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_embarked FOREIGN KEY ("embarked") REFERENCES embarkation_ports ("port_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_voyage_id FOREIGN KEY ("voyage_id") REFERENCES voyages ("voyage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classifications" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class (e.g., 1st, 2nd, 3rd) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class amenities */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of passengers in each class */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Detailed list of amenities provided in each class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender_label" TEXT /* Label representing gender (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "embarkation_ports" (
  "port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each port */,
  "port_name" TEXT /* Name of the port (e.g., Cherbourg, Queenstown) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the port is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the port */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the port */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the port */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voyages" (
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voyage */,
  "departure_date" TEXT /* Date of departure for the voyage */,
  "arrival_date" TEXT /* Date of arrival for the voyage */,
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the ship undertaking the voyage */,
  "origin_port_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the port of origin */,
  "destination_port_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the destination port */,
  "captain_name" TEXT /* Name of the captain */,
  "crew_size" INTEGER /* Number of crew members on the voyage */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the voyage */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the voyage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voyage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voyages_ship_id FOREIGN KEY ("ship_id") REFERENCES ships ("ship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voyages_destination_port_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_port_id") REFERENCES embarkation_ports ("port_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voyages_origin_port_id FOREIGN KEY ("origin_port_id") REFERENCES embarkation_ports ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ships" (
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the ship */,
  "ship_name" TEXT /* Name of the ship */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum passenger capacity of the ship */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the ship was built */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the ship in meters */,
  "width" REAL /* Width of the ship in meters */,
  "tonnage" REAL /* Tonnage of the ship */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Name of the owner or company */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the ship (e.g., active, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fares" (
  "fare_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the fare record */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Class associated with the fare */,
  "fare_amount" REAL /* Fare amount for the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fare_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fares_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classifications ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ages" (
  "age_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the age category */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Description of the age range (e.g., '0-12', '13-19', '20-35', etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survival_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the statistics record */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Class of the passengers */,
  "total_passengers" INTEGER /* Total number of passengers in this class */,
  "survivors" INTEGER /* Number of survivors in this class */,
  "survival_rate" REAL /* Calculated survival rate for this class */,
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the voyage */,
  "age_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the age category */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the gender */,
  "embarked_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the embarkation port */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survival_statistics_voyage_id FOREIGN KEY ("voyage_id") REFERENCES voyages ("voyage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survival_statistics_embarked_id FOREIGN KEY ("embarked_id") REFERENCES embarkation_ports ("port_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survival_statistics_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classifications ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survival_statistics_age_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_id") REFERENCES ages ("age_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survival_statistics_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin, safety officer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure access */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
